summary: Added electric arc line shader effect for LineSegments geometry. Created subdivideEdges utility that tessellates edges into sub-segments with aEdgeParam (tapered 0-at-endpoints), aEdgeTangent, and aRandom attributes. Created electricArc vertex/fragment shaders that apply simplex noise-based lateral displacement perpendicular to edge direction, driven by treble energy (jaggedness) and bass energy (brightness). Constellation-specific shader variants preserve distance-based alpha. Quality profile gates the feature: disabled on low tier, 5 subdivisions on medium, 8 on high. Integrated into both wireframePolyhedra and constellationLines systems with full uniform updates per frame. All 1260 tests pass, build succeeds.
